summary: Tested multi-language translation system with i18next/Zustand. Found 2 major bugs: (1) Onboarding page shows English instead of French default due to browser language detection overriding the intended French default, (2) Profile page menu items use hardcoded French strings instead of translation function t(). Language selector works correctly and shows all 7 languages.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows English texts ('Welcome to CryptoNai', 'Get Started', 'Sign In') instead of French on first load when localStorage is empty. Browser language detection via getDeviceLanguage() overrides the default French setting

Menu items use hardcoded French strings instead of t() translation function. Affected items: Panel Admin, Dashboard Pro, Devenir Pro, Mes réservations, Mes cours, Messages, Mon profil public, Mes succès, Checklist Investissement, Centre d'aide. Only the 'Langue' item uses t('settings.language')

action_items: Fix languageStore.ts getDeviceLanguage() to respect app's intended French default instead of detecting browser language, OR update loadLanguage() to prioritize app default over browser detection
Update profile.tsx menu items to use t() translation function instead of hardcoded French strings
Add translation keys to translations.ts for profile menu items (e.g., profile.adminPanel, profile.myCourses, profile.messages, etc.)
critical_code_review_comments: languageStore.ts line 54: getDeviceLanguage() overrides default French when no saved language exists
profile.tsx lines 178-338: Hardcoded French strings should be replaced with t() calls
Missing translation keys in translations.ts for profile page menu items
context_for_next_testing_agent: Translation system partially implemented. Login page works correctly with translations. Language selector modal in profile works and shows all 7 languages (FR, EN, ES, DE, PT, IT, ZH). Main issues: (1) onboarding defaults to English due to browser detection, (2) profile menu items hardcoded in French

onboarding_translations.issue: Shows English instead of French default for new users

login_page_translations.notes: Shows correct French translations: Bon retour, Email, Mot de passe, Se connecter

language_selector_modal.notes: All 7 languages displayed correctly with flags. Selection works and persists

language_switch.notes: Language setting changes correctly but profile menu items don't update due to hardcoded strings

profile_page_translations.notes: Uses hardcoded French strings instead of t() function. Only language selector menu item uses translation
